hub.title: Rawnaq
hub.subtitle: A sustainable fabric design experience inspired by William Morris
hub.modal_subtitle: Enter your participation code to access this section
hub.morris_desc: Discover the life and vision of the father of Arts & Crafts and his lasting legacy
hub.fabrics_desc: Discover eco-friendly fabric types and their impact on the future of textile
hub.technique_desc: Learn the traditional weaving technique step-by-step with interactive animation
hub.design_desc: Create your own pattern on different fabrics and preview your design live
hub.survey_desc: Share your experience evaluation and contribute to this scientific research
